Localization.Description: A user or group is invited to a project

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Failed to invite a user to a project on host {event_src.host}
Failed to invite a group to a project on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} invited a group to the project with ID {object.id} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} invited a user to the project with ID {object.id} on host {event_src.host}
